## Meeting Purpose

[Define the thought leadership narrative for the Airbyte Context launch.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Audience, New Problem:** Airbyte Context serves AI engineers building agents, not data engineers. This audience struggles with the complexity of building and maintaining data connectors, which distracts them from core product development.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Operational Data vs. Analytics:** Agents require real-time, on-demand operational data (e.g., a single customer record) to take action, a fundamentally different pattern from the historical, aggregated data used for analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Agentic Data Infrastructure:** Airbyte Context is a new category, providing the data layer that powers agent context. It is the "pipes" that feed internal data to an agent, while the agent itself handles execution and models.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Open Source is Critical:** Open source is essential for AI infrastructure. It provides the transparency and self-hosted control required for agents handling sensitive internal data, building trust that SaaS cannot.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: AI Engineers Become Accidental Data Engineers

  - [AI engineers building agents are forced to become data experts, distracting them from their core product.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Why this is a problem:**](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**High Maintenance:** Connectors are "living organisms" that break with vendor API changes.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Scaling Issues:** Rate limits and API restrictions cause connectors to fail as user counts grow.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Configuration Complexity:** Customers' unique system setups are often incompatible with generic connectors.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**The outcome:** Teams get bogged down in connector maintenance, preventing focus on agent logic and product innovation.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### The Solution: Airbyte Context as Agentic Data Infrastructure

  - [**Mission Evolution:** Airbyte's mission remains "making data available and actionable." The change is the consumer: agents, not just warehouses.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Category Definition:** "Agentic data infrastructure"—the data layer powering agent context.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Core Function:** Provide on-demand data access to agents. Airbyte Context is the "pipes" that feed internal data, while the agent handles execution, models, and GPUs.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Analogy:** An agent is like a new employee with a goal. Airbyte Context gives it access to all necessary resources (HubSpot, Google Docs) to complete the task.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)

### Why Now: The Agent Paradigm Shift

  - [**Market Readiness:** The agent market is moving beyond support agents (a proven cost-center) into marketing, engineering, and other core business functions.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Efficiency Gains:** Agents automate tedious tasks, freeing humans for higher-level work (e.g., list enrichment time reduced from weeks to hours).](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Technology Readiness:** LLMs are now capable enough to act as the "CPU" for these operational agents.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### The Foundation: Open Source & Enterprise Trust

  - [**Why Open Source is Critical for AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Rapid Innovation:** Fosters community discovery of new patterns in a fast-moving field.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**Security & Control:** Provides the transparency and self-hosted deployment options required for agents handling sensitive internal data (e.g., HR, finance).](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Enterprise Advantage:** Airbyte's background serving banks and insurance companies provides a proven track record for deploying secure, compliant data infrastructure at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)

### Success Metrics & Go-to-Market

  - [**Initial Goal:** 10,000 GitHub stars for the new "AI-ready connectors."](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
      - [**Open Source Adoption:** Usage of AI-ready connectors.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
      - [**Platform Conversion:** OS users converting to the Airbyte Context platform.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
      - [**Revenue Growth:** Sales of platform features.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
      - [**Product Adoption:** Self-serve signups.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
  - [**Target Customer:** AI-native startups or high-velocity internal teams building agent-powered products.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:** Analyze meeting notes and send any remaining questions to the Airbyte team for async follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/hxeVv4J6SZcDpvBu4U7RiWXJGjzxfJVU?tab=summary&timestamp=3489.0)
